title: App Settings - General - Notifications & Device Alerts  - Settings toggles On/Off
feature: App Settings - General - Notifications & Device Alerts
scenario: Verify notification and device alert toggles in General > Notifications can be switched On/Off and persist after reopening the tab and restarting the app
steps: 1. Open the app and navigate to General > Notifications tab.
2. Locate the notification and device alert settings toggles.
3. Test scenario 1 - Changing individual toggles: Switch one toggle ON, then switch it OFF. Repeat for each toggle individually.
4. Test scenario 2 - Setting all toggles to ON: Switch all notification and device alert toggles to the ON position.
5. Test scenario 3 - Setting all toggles to OFF: Switch all notification and device alert toggles to the OFF position.
6. After each scenario, close the General > Notifications tab and reopen it.
7. Verify that the toggle states remain the same as set in the previous step.
9. Navigate back to General > Notifications tab.
10. Confirm that all toggle states persist (remain as set) after the app restart.
expected: All notification and device alert settings toggles can be switched On/Off successfully. The selected state of each toggle persists when reopening the General > Notifications tab and after restarting the app, for all test scenarios (individual toggles, all ON, all OFF).
